Bash(python -c "
_PET_MAX_XP = {
    'COMMON': 3864068, 'UNCOMMON': 8333068, 'RARE': 14803068,
    'EPIC': 25353068, 'LEGENDARY': 40603068, 'MYTHIC': 40603068,
}
_PET_XP_ANCHORS = [
    \(0.000, 1\),\(0.002, 10\),\(0.008, 20\),\(0.020, 30\),\(0.045, 40\),
    \(0.090, 50\),\(0.175, 60\),\(0.315, 70\),\(0.510, 80\),\(0.720, 90\),
    \(0.870, 95\),\(1.000, 100\),
]
def _pet_level_from_xp\(exp, tier\):
    max_xp = _PET_MAX_XP.get\(tier.upper\(\), 40603068\)
    if exp <= 0: return 1
    if exp >= max_xp: return 100
    ratio = exp / max_xp
    for i in range\(1, len\(_PET_XP_ANCHORS\)\):
        r1,l1 = _PET_XP_ANCHORS[i-1]; r2,l2 = _PET_XP_ANCHORS[i]
        if ratio <= r2:
            t = \(ratio-r1\)/\(r2-r1\) if r2>r1 else 0
            return max\(1,min\(100,round\(l1+t*\(l2-l1\)\)\)\)
    return 100

def mult\(level\):
    if level >= 100: return 1.0
    if level <= 1: return 0.20
    return 0.20 + 0.80*\(level/100\)**0.75

print\('=== LEGENDARY ==='\)
for xp in [0, 100_000, 1_000_000, 5_000_000, 10_000_000, 20_000_000, 30_000_000, 40_603_068]:
    lvl = _pet_level_from_xp\(xp, 'LEGENDARY'\)
    print\(f'  XP={xp:>12,}  lvl={lvl:3}  price_mult={mult\(lvl\):.2f}x'\)
print\(\)
print\('=== COMMON ==='\)
for xp in [0, 50_000, 200_000, 1_000_000, 2_000_000, 3_864_068]:
    lvl = _pet_level_from_xp\(xp, 'COMMON'\)
    print\(f'  XP={xp:>12,}  lvl={lvl:3}  price_mult={mult\(lvl\):.2f}x'\)
" 2>&1)
